creator: nevecherya@gmail.com
text:
You added entry in VuXML
...
    <affects>
      <package>
        <name>libssh2</name>
        <range><lt>1.8.1</lt></range>
      </package>
    </affects>
...
But needs
...
    <affects>
      <package>
        <name>libssh2</name>
        <range><lt>1.8.1,3</lt></range>
      </package>
    </affects>
...
Otherwise previous port versions aren't marked as vulnerable.
